about.title: About
about.description: About Elver Tobo — backend software engineer with 4+ years building Python, AWS serverless, and cloud-native systems. Security background; open to remote roles.
about.body:
My background includes production debugging, security-focused development, infrastructure as code, cloud automation, and reliable backend service design. I also use Cursor to accelerate my development workflow, improve code quality, explore solutions, and increase delivery speed while maintaining technical judgment and ownership of the code.

My main professional experience has been at Fluid Attacks as a Security Developer, where I built multiple features and worked across analytics, engineering, and incident management.

I'm especially interested in roles where I can contribute to scalable systems, improve reliability, and build maintainable software in production environments.

I'm also developing expertise in AI-assisted software systems, including RAG applications and AI agents, with a practical focus on using AI to solve real business and engineering problems.

As a hobby and part of my personal brand, I enjoy writing articles on Medium. If you'd like to read them, you can find them at articles.etobo.tech.

Tech stack: Cursor, Python, FastAPI, AWS Lambda, S3, EC2, RDS, DynamoDB, CloudWatch, ECS, Bedrock, API Gateway, EventBridge, SNS, SSM, Terraform, Docker, GitLab, Git, Bash, LangChain, LangGraph, and LangSmith.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Contact Elver Tobo — backend engineer (Python, AWS, security, AI). Email or LinkedIn for remote roles, consulting, and collaborations.
contact.body: The best way to reach me is by email or LinkedIn. I'm open to collaborations, consulting, and interesting opportunities, and I'm always happy to talk about backend systems, cloud architecture, and AI tooling.
